visual_description: Three men in dark robes stand in a dimly lit, cluttered room, the central figure with pale hair points a wand forward while the others behind him also aim wands. The scene then cuts to a man with glasses and a brown jacket standing in a dark room, looking forward with a neutral expression. The lighting remains low throughout.
audio_description: A male voice speaks calmly, delivering a line in Mandarin. No other audible sounds are present.
